title: Per-iteration cost tracking and budget enforcement

stop_dispatcher.py: Added _build_iteration_cost_record() function: builds per-iteration cost record with tokens_input, tokens_output, api_cost_usd, tool_invocations, wall_time_seconds
Extended _ralph_budget_tracking() to record per-iteration costs in state['iterations'] list, track total_cost_usd, enforce budget_cost_usd_limit
Extended _stop_ralph_loop() to include completion_report with total_cost_usd, total_iterations, per_iteration_costs, budget_limit_tokens, budget_used_tokens
tests/test_stop_dispatcher.py: Added test_per_iteration_cost_breakdown: verifies iterations list with cost fields, token split, and total_cost_usd accumulation
Added test_budget_cost_enforcement_halts_ralph: verifies Ralph stops when api_cost_usd exceeds budget_cost_usd_limit, completion_report included

config_keys.budget_cost_usd_limit: USD threshold to halt Ralph (0 = uncapped)
